LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF FOREMAN & BRASSO'S MOTION FOR DISCHARGE FROM LIABILITY AS A MERE STAKEHOLDER WITH NO INTEREST IN THE INTERPLEADER FUNDS; REQUEST FOR ATTORNNEY'S FEES AND COSTS - MOTION IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF HAS ESTABLISHED THAT IT HAS NO INTEREST IN THE MONEY DEPOSITED WITH THE COURT AND DISMISSAL IS PROPER UNDER CCP 386.5. PLAINTIFF IS AWARDED $2,750.00 IN ATTORNEY'S FEES PURSUANT TO CCP 386.6, WHICH SUM IS PAYABLE OUT OF THE FUNDS ON DEPOSIT WITH THE COURT. THE REQUEST FOR COSTS IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF FAILED TO FILE A MEMORANDUM OF COSTS OR SUFFICIENTLY EXPLAIN WHAT COSTS IT SEEKS TO RECOVER. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: CURTIS KARNOW, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER CSR # 5976
MINUTES FOR SEP-24-2012 10:00 AM

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Discharge From Liability As A Mere Stakeholder
Off Calendar Jul-30-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. MICHAEL SCHREIbER OF FOREMAN & BRASSO, TEL. NO. 433-3475 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
JOSEPH ALVARADO, TEL. NO., DEFENDANT APPEARING IN PRO PER.

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF FOREMAN & BRASSO'S Motion For Discharge From Liability As A Mere Stakeholder with no interest in the interpleader funds; Request for Attornney's Fees and costs - Motion is Granted. Plaintiff has established that it has no interest in the money deposited with the Court and dismissal is proper under CCP 386.5. Plaintiff is awarded $2,750.00 in attorney's fees pursuant to CCP 386.6, which sum is payable out of the funds on deposit with the Court. The request for costs is denied without prejudice. Plaintiff failed to file a memorandum of costs or sufficiently explain what costs it seeks to recover. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Curtis Karnow, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR # 5976 =(302/CK)
